content.text:
Based on the image provided, I can clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 10 (C:10). Looking at the molecular structure:

Atom C:10 (carbon, index 10) is covalently connected to:
- O:11 (oxygen, index 11) - red sphere
- N:9 (nitrogen, index 9) - blue sphere  
- C:12 (carbon, index 12) - yellow/gold sphere

These three atoms are directly bonded to C:10, as shown by the connecting bonds in the molecular structure.

Regarding the geomconf_index, from the file information provided in the working directory, I can see the file "geomconf_7446.xyz", which indicates that the geomconf_index for this molecule is **7446**.

So the neighbor atoms of atom index 10 are:
- Atom index 9: N (nitrogen)
- Atom index 11: O (oxygen)  
- Atom index 12: C (carbon)

Geomconf_index: 7446

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 10, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
